_comment: BT31 Impact Beyond Dimensions — inherits Standard 24x12 defaults. Default set (DEFAULT_SET_ID). Official TCGCSV Booster Box Description confirms 12 cards/pack, 24 packs/box. Type counts: Common x50, Uncommon x40, Rare x34, Super Rare x18, Concept Rare x6-7, Special Rare x15, Special Leader Rare x10, Secret Rare x2-3, God Rare x2 (178 types total).
